narrative:
Middleburg Heights-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 961 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.6 percentage points.
